picks.reasoning: Liverpool at Anfield on the final day have a massive incentive: a win could secure a Champions League spot for the 6th-placed team, adding league-wide drama. Arne Slot will want to finish his debut season on a high.

In a shock final-day relegation scrap, Spurs have their captain Cristian Romero back from a controversial trip to Argentina. The home crowd will be electric, and the desperation for survival should see them overcome an Everton side with nothing but spoiler intent.

picks.match: West Ham United vs Leeds United
picks.reasoning: West Ham are fighting to stay in the division. With their former manager David Moyes (now at Everton) rooting for them, and home advantage against a Leeds side, the Hammers are strong value to secure the points they need.
